title: Nami Faces Miss Doublefinger
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on nami faces miss doublefinger, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Nami Faces Miss Doublefinger. Nami fights Miss Doublefinger and learns how to use Usopp’s strange weapon under deadly pressure. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta rebel
dialogue.text: What the hell was that though!?

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: I told you already! Mr. 4's a clean up hitter who fights with his dog!

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta rebel
dialogue.text: Yes, and I told you I have no idea what the hell you're talking about!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 4
dialogue.text: Mr. 4's Beloved Gun Gun Gun-Dog Lassoo (Has a cold)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What the hell is that thing!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: No, usopp! You can't just dodge it! You've gotta run far away!

summary: This part develops nami faces miss doublefinger and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
